Title: Sherlock Jr.

Title: Chhichhore

Title: Paan Singh Tomar

Title: Talvar

Title: To Be or Not to Be
Overview: During the Nazi occupation of Poland, an acting troupe becomes embroiled in a Polish soldier's efforts to track down a German spy.

Title: Du rififi chez les hommes

Title: Höstsonaten

Title: Finding Nemo
Overview: After his son is captured in the Great Barrier Reef and taken to Sydney, a timid clownfish sets out on a journey to bring him home.

Title: The Truman Show

Title: The Sixth Sense
Overview: A boy who communicates with spirits seeks the help of a disheartened child psychologist.

Title: Mad Max: Fury Road

Title: Jurassic Park

Title: Gone Girl
Overview: With his wife's disappearance having become the focus of an intense media circus, a man sees the spotlight turned on him when it's suspected that he may not be innocent.

Title: No Country for Old Men

Title: Catch Me If You Can

Title: Monsters, Inc.

Title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 2

Title: The Big Lebowski

Title: The Grand Budapest Hotel

Title: Blade Runner

Title: How to Train Your Dragon

Title: Logan

Title: Fargo

Title: Prisoners

Along the way, Christopher encounters a series of characters that shape his life.

Title: Hacksaw Ridge

Title: Life of Brian

Title: Stand by Me

Title: The Deer Hunter

Title: Ford v Ferrari

Title: Gone with the Wind

Title: Before Sunrise
Overview: A young man and woman meet on a train in Europe, and wind up spending one evening together in Vienna. Unfortunately, both know that this will probably be their only night together.

Title: Hachi: A Dog's Tale

Title: Before Sunset

Title: Amores perros

Title: The Elephant Man

Title: Ben-Hur

Title: The Bridge on the River Kwai

Title: Relatos salvajes
Overview: Six short stories that explore the extremities of human behavior involving people in distress.

Title: Mary and Max
Overview: A tale of friendship between two unlikely pen pals: Mary, a lonely, eight-year-old girl living in the suburbs of Melbourne, and Max, a forty-four-year old, severely obese man living in New York.

Title: PK

Title: Cool Hand Luke
Overview: A laid back Southern man is sentenced to two years in a rural prison, but refuses to conform.

Title: Soul

Title: The Third Man

Title: In the Name of the Father

Title: Kaze no tani no Naushika
Overview: Warrior and pacifist Princess Nausicaä desperately struggles to prevent two warring nations from destroying themselves and their dying planet.

Title: La haine
Overview: 24 hours in the lives of three young men in the French suburbs the day after a violent riot.

Title: Barry Lyndon
Overview: An Irish rogue wins the heart of a rich widow and assumes her dead husband's aristocratic position in 18th-century England.

Title: Network
Overview: A television network cynically exploits a deranged former anchor's ravings and revelations about the news media for its own profit.

Title: On the Waterfront
Overview: An ex-prize fighter turned longshoreman struggles to stand up to his corrupt union bosses.

Title: Contratiempo
Overview: A successful entrepreneur accused of murder and a witness preparation expert have less than three hours to come up with an impregnable defense.

Title: Salinui chueok

Title: Fa yeung nin wah
Overview: Two neighbors, a woman and a man, form a strong bond after both suspect extramarital activities of their spouses. However, they agree to keep their bond platonic so as not to commit similar wrongs.

Title: Rebecca

Title: Ah-ga-ssi
Overview: A woman is hired as a handmaiden to a Japanese heiress, but secretly she is involved in a plot to defraud her.

Title: Mr. Smith Goes to Washington
Overview: A naive man is appointed to fill a vacancy in the United States Senate. His plans promptly collide with political corruption, but he doesn't back down.

Title: Les quatre cents coups
Overview: A young boy, left without attention, delves into a life of petty crime.

Title: Lagaan: Once Upon a Time in India
Overview: The people of a small village in Victorian India stake their future on a game of cricket against their ruthless British rulers.

Title: Persona
Overview: A nurse is put in charge of a mute actress and finds that their personae are melding together.

Title: It Happened One Night
Overview: A renegade reporter and a crazy young heiress meet on a bus heading for New York, and end up stuck with each other when the bus leaves them behind at one of the stops.

Title: Paris, Texas
Overview: Travis Henderson, an aimless drifter who has been missing for four years, wanders out of the desert and must reconnect with society, himself, his life, and his family.

Title: Trois couleurs: Rouge
Overview: A model discovers a retired judge is keen on invading people's privacy.

Title: The General
Overview: When Union spies steal an engineer's beloved locomotive, he pursues it single-handedly and straight through enemy lines.

Title: Solaris
Overview: A psychologist is sent to a station orbiting a distant planet in order to discover what has caused the crew to go insane.

Title: Pink Floyd: The Wall
Overview: A confined but troubled rock star descends into madness in the midst of his physical and social isolation from everyone.

Title: Barfi!
Overview: Three young people learn that love can neither be defined nor contained by society's definition of normal and abnormal.

Title: Munna Bhai M.B.B.S.
Overview: A gangster sets out to fulfill his father's dream of becoming a doctor.

Title: A Wednesday
Overview: A retiring police officer reminisces about the most astounding day of his career. About a case that was never filed but continues to haunt him in his memories - the case of a man and a Wednesday.

Title: The Man Who Shot Liberty Valance
Overview: A senator returns to a western town for the funeral of an old friend and tells the story of his origins.

Title: Zindagi Na Milegi Dobara
Overview: Three friends decide to turn their fantasy vacation into reality after one of their friends gets engaged.

Title: Dil Chahta Hai
Overview: Three inseparable childhood friends are just out of college. Nothing comes between them - until they each fall in love, and their wildly different approaches to relationships creates tension.

Title: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge

Title: Chung Hing sam lam

Title: La leggenda del pianista sull'oceano
Overview: A baby boy, discovered in 1900 on an ocean liner, grows into a musical prodigy, never setting foot on land.

Title: Kahaani

Title: Fanny och Alexander

Title: Das Cabinet des Dr. Caligari

Title: Underground

Title: Le salaire de la peur

Title: OMG: Oh My God!

Title: Song of the Sea

Title: Haider

Title: What Ever Happened to Baby Jane?

Title: Okuribito

Title: Koe no katachi

Title: Kis Uykusu

Title: Le samouraï

Title: Lage Raho Munna Bhai

Title: Le notti di Cabiria
